name: EdwLoadAuditRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: ;WITH cte AS ( SELECT MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBER_AUDIT' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} ) UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' WHERE SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'MEMBER_AUDIT' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= (SELECT LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte) AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2006 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 


JOB NAME:    EdwLoadAuditRunCycUpd


DESCRIPTION:    Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      

INPUTS:	EDW - Member Audit Table
               

HASH FILES:  none


TRANSFORMS:  none


PROCESSING:  The EDW member table is updated depending on the lowest run cycle number in the P_RUN_CYCLE table that hasn't been updated to EDW.  These run cycle values are used to update the IDS P_RUN_CYCLE, load indicator field for the particular source and subject.  All run cycles less than the maximum where the indicator is "N" are updated to "Y".
  

OUTPUTS:    IDS    - P_RUN_CYC

                                                                              from Key column to non- key column

Annotations:
Job Name: EdwLoadAuditrunCycleUpd_EE
Determine higher Run Cycle for Member Audit table
Add Defaults and set EDW_LOAD_IN = Y
Update P_RUN_CYC table to indicate sourcesystem data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycle processed
